hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "APPGAMBIT AI Coordinator needs attention" with title "AI Company"'

echo "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ) RATE_LIMIT HIT" >> /tmp/coordinator-rate-limits.log && osascript -e 'display notification "Rate limit hit! Coordinator pausing all work." with title "AI Company - RATE LIMIT"'
echo 'Session resumed. Read coordinator/CLAUDE.md and coordinator/REGISTRY.md to rebuild state. The external loop script will send /check-cycle automatically — no need to start /loop.'
echo 'Context compacted. Re-read coordinator/CLAUDE.md for your operating manual.' && cat coordinator/CLAUDE.md
